MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Crystal Frank, property manager, appearing on behalf plaintiff Shoreview Apartments, LP
Ivy Tseng, Esq. for plaintiff

Ebony Manning, defendant
Selby Lighthill, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 15 Lillian Court, #5, San Francisco, CA 94124.

Trial date is vacated.
